query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.role,
  u.status,
  COUNT(c.id) as total_contratos
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN contratos c ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.status
ORDER BY u.name;
